description:
Download audio from YouTube, SoundCloud or Bandcamp.

You like to listen to music on YouTube, SoundCloud or Bandcamp and want to save it for offline playing. Or you want to download the soundtrack of a new movie. Then we recommend you to try out this software developed specifically for this purpose.
- [CRITICAL] fixed download from YouTube
- added support for reddit.com
- added support for bilibili.com
- added option to split YouTube audio by chapters
- lots of improvements for YouTube
- fixed download of large YouTube playlists (100+ videos)
- fixed YouTube Music album links parsing
- fixed download from Twitter
- lots of improvements for SoundCloud
- fixed download of large Spotify playlists
- improved Spotify track matching accuracy
- fixed download from Hearthis.at
- [win] fixed empty window title
- minor improvements for stability
